label: Data Connection (XDM event mapping)

provisioning.label: Data Connection
provisioning.help: Install the Data Connection module + configure a datastream. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/data-connection

postNote: Forwards first-party Commerce events to AEP/Analytics/Target via the datastream. XDM field types MUST match the Commerce event schema (commerce-saas/data-connection-schema).
